briefdescription.para: Aborts the resolution of the current time step.
surcharge Objet_U::associer_(Objet_U& ob) Associe differents objets au probleme en controlant

para.verbatim: le type de l'objet a associer a l'execution. On peut ainsi associer: un schema en temps, un domaine de calcul ou un milieu physique. Utilise les routine de la classe Type_Info (Utilitaires)

simplesect.para: (int) 1 si association reussie 0 sinon 2 si le milieu est deja associe a un autre probleme

briefdescription.para: Complete les equations associees au probleme.

detaileddescription.para: Remplissage des references, deleguee aux equations.

briefdescription.para: Compute the value the Problem would like for the next time step.

detaileddescription.para: This value will not necessarily be used at the call of initTimeStep, but it is a hint. This method may use all the internal state of the Problem.

parameterdescription.para: Does the Problem want to stop ?

memberdef.argsstring: (const double timestep, const int rk_step, ArrOfDouble &var_volume_par_bulle, const int first_step_interface_smoothing)
memberdef.name: deplacer_interfaces

memberdef.argsstring: (const double timestep, const int rk_step, ArrOfDouble &var_volume_par_bulle)
memberdef.name: deplacer_interfaces_rk3

detaileddescription.para: Nothing to be done here for now ...

briefdescription.para: Donne des informations sur le type de l'Objet_U.

simplesect.para: (const Type_info*) structure regroupant les informations sur le type de l'Objet_U

briefdescription.para: This method is called once at the beginning, before any other one of the interface Problem.
This method allocates and initializes the unknown and given fields for the future time step.

detaileddescription.para: The value of the interval is imposed through the parameter dt. In case of error, returns false.

parameterdescription.para: dt) the time interval to allocate

simplesect.para: (bool) true=OK, false=error, not able to tackle this dt

briefdescription.para: In the case solveTimeStep uses an iterative process, this method executes a single iteration.

detaileddescription.para: It is thus possible to modify the given fields between iterations. converged is set to true if the process has converged, ie if the unknown fields are solution to the problem on the next time step. Otherwise converged is set to false. The return value indicates if the convergence process behaves normally. If false, the Problem wishes to abort the time step resolution.

parameterdescription.para: converged) It is a return value : true if the process has converged, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Lecture des equations du probleme.
Effectue une mise a jour en temps du probleme.

detaileddescription.para: Effectue la mise a jour sur toutes les equations du probleme.

parameterdescription.para: temps) le pas de temps de mise a jour

briefdescription.para: Prepare le calcul: initialise les parametres du milieu et prepare le calcul de chacune des equations.
Returns the present time.

detaileddescription.para: This value may change only at the call of validateTimeStep. A surcharger

briefdescription.para: Reset the current time of the Problem to a given value.

detaileddescription.para: Particularly useful for the initialization of complex transients: the starting point of the transient of interest is computed first, the time is reset to 0, and then the actual transient of interest starts with proper initial conditions, and global time 0.

parameterdescription.para: exception if called before initialize() or after terminate().
exception if called inside the TIME_STEP_DEFINED context (see Problem documentation)

briefdescription.para: Cette methode est une sorte de main() du Problem Elle peut etre utilisee si le probleme n'est couple a aucun autre.
Ecriture sur fichier en vue d'une reprise (sauvegarde)
Tells to the Problem that stationary is reached or not.
pour recodage eventuel et appel unifie en python
This method is called once at the end, after any other one.

detaileddescription.para: It frees the memory and saves anything that needs to be saved.

briefdescription.para: ATTENTION :

detaileddescription.para: Rentre ici tout ce qui ne correspond pas a l'API normale de Problem.
Actuellement on y met a jour les CLs et les termes sources, sachant que certains vont chercher eux-memes des informations dans les problemes voisins...

Programme de travail : tout ce qui est dans cette methode doit etre rendu independant de l'exterieur, et peut du coup rejoindre initTimeStep. Le reste passe dans l'interface d'echange de champs. Ce travail sera fini quand updateGivenFields sera vide et supprime !

briefdescription.para: Validates the calculated unknown by moving the present time at the end of the time step.

detaileddescription.para: This method is allowed to free past values of the unknown and given fields.

briefdescription.para: Ecriture de l'objet sur un flot de sortie Methode a surcharger.
Lecture d'un probleme dans un flot d'entree, et ouverture du flot de sauvegarde.

detaileddescription.para: Format: { nom_milieu bloc de lecture d'un milieu nom_equation bloc de lecture d'une equation Postraitement bloc de lecture postraitement reprise | sauvegarde | sauvegarde_simple formatte | binaire | pdi nom_de_fichier } L'option sauvegarde_simple permet de sauver le probleme dans le fichier choisi en ecrasant a chaque fois les sauvegardes precedentes : cela permet d'economiser de la place disque.

parameterdescription.para: d'accolade ouvrante en debut de format
d'accolade fermante en fin de jeu de donnee

memberdef.argsstring: (const int rk_step, const double total_timestep, const double fractionnal_timestep, const double time)
memberdef.name: rk3_sub_step

detaileddescription.para: Fills in all possible fields that may be post-processed. Done only once even if multiple problems.

node.label: FixedVector< std::shared_ptr< IJK_Field_template< T, TRUSTArray< T > > >, N >

childnode.edgelabel: < std::shared_ptr< IJK_Field_template< T, TRUSTArray< T > > >, N >

node.label: FixedVector< std::shared_ptr< IJK_Field_template< double, TRUSTArray< double > > >, N >

childnode.edgelabel: < std::shared_ptr< IJK_Field_template< double, TRUSTArray< double > > >, N >

node.label: FixedVector< std::shared_ptr< IJK_Field_template< int, TRUSTArray< int > > >, N >

childnode.edgelabel: < std::shared_ptr< IJK_Field_template< int, TRUSTArray< int > > >, N >
